content:
VENDOR EMPANELMENT INVITATION

Seeking Manpower Vendors Across Bihar

We are looking to empanel reliable vendors and recruitment partners who can provide:

✅Factory Helpers

✅General Workers

✅Loading & Unloading Staff

✅Production Line Helpers

✅Warehouse & Packaging Staff

Requirements

Ability to provide manpower in Bihar

Valid GST & Registration (Preferred)

Experience in manpower supply/staffing

Quick deployment capability

Benefits

✅Long-Term Business Association

✅Timely Payments

✅Regular Manpower Requirements

✅Growth Opportunities Across Multiple Industries

Send Your Company Profile

📧jeetprofitswipe@gmail.com
7079939496

Profit Swipe Solutions

Building Workforce, Empowering Industries

"Let's Grow Together Through Strategic Vendor Partnerships."

comment: In manpower partnerships, consistency matters as much as availability—strong screening, attendance tracking, and compliance processes often decide long-term success for both vendors and industries.
